text_block_list.name: Banquet Host
text_block_list.text:
Well, everyone, let us ring in the new year on a happy note. Here's to
another year of victories for the Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hear, hear! Time to DIG IN, McQueen! Should I have sushi first? Or
maybe crab?! Oh, how will I ever decide!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Likewise, I am currently deciding whether I should throw you out. This
party is meant for the Mejiro family, you know.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Little Miss Rule Follower! We've swapped backwash from
sports drinks countless times—we basically share the same DNA!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now come! Before all those little fishies escape, let us fill the fishing
nets of our stomachs with the bounty of the sea!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Can't you at least try to make sense...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, Dober. Happy New Year to you two as well. May this year be as
splendid as the last.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's hope so. We'll just have to train our hardest yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You must be in high spirits, Dober, considering your G1 win last year.
I've heard a great many whispers about you. It seems expectations are
high.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, she sure is popular, all right. As a fellow Mejiro, I couldn't be
more proud.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-I'm not doing this to be popular! I just run the races I want to win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Anyway, wouldn't you say there's someone else people are expecting a lot from?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah... I just saw her a little bit ago...

text_block_list.name: Banquet Host
text_block_list.text:
Miss Bright, your speech is coming up, so please make your way to
the stage.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...What speech?

text_block_list.name: Banquet Host
text_block_list.text: The one where you talk about your achievements this last year! The one I just told you about!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, so I just have to give a speech? All right, consider it done.

text_block_list.name: Banquet Host
text_block_list.text: Please, Miss... Don't forget again...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh? If it isn't Ryan. It's nice to see you as well, McQueen, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Looks like we're playing second fiddle to Ryan again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Well, I have looked after her since she was little.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Bright, that was an excellent showing at the spring Tenno Sho. I heard
you also received a URA Award.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The Tenno Sho is a race forever linked to the Mejiro family. It was my
greatest honor to have taken home such a significant win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But of course, I could not have achieved that honor without Ryan, my
dear teammate. I am forever in your debt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm just happy to see you bounce back. Your classic year was pretty
rough, but it looks like that's behind you now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Now we can focus on getting you some new titles in the new year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It sounds like that's going to be quite the challenge this year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I suppose you speak of... the Golden Generation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. They've all moved on to their senior years now, which means
we'll be facing off with them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
No matter who my opponent is, I shall focus only on achieving what I
must.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
After all those defeats, I have finally come into my own. I have no
intention of giving up my place so easily.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And I will prove it... by taking the spring Tenno Sho shield once more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
For the Mejiro family, the Tenno Sho is indeed a special race. If you
manage to win it again, it would be the first time since McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, Bright's pretty stubborn, you know. If she says she's going to
win, that's that.

text_block_list.name: Banquet Host
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, there you are, Miss Bright! I've been looking all over for you!
It's time for your speech!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...What speech?

text_block_list.name: Banquet Host
text_block_list.text: I can't do this agaiiin!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So Bright's next goal is the spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Something wrong, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No, rather... this was bound to happen.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Gods, buddhas, and the great Shiraoki! Please help me win lots and
lots of races this year!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And... stop me from gaining weight even when I have dessert!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The new year has begun and with it, Special Week's senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a way to celebrate this turning of the pages, Team Sirius has
gathered for our first shrine visit of the year.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the wait, everyone! I'm all prayed up and ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You sure looked serious over there... By the way, who's Shiraoki?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see you've been talking to Fukukitaru...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
We can't rely on prayers alone. You're going to need to put in the
effort if you want to make real progress.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
We can't rely on prayers alone. You're going to need to put in the
effort if you want to make real progress.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, of course! I'm gonna train harder than ever!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
After all, if there's one thing I've learned this year, it's that first place
reeeally doesn't come easy!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Last year was hard on you, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her Derby victory, we dove into training with vigor, hoping to
follow up that win with more...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She just keeps going, going, and going! Look at Seiun Sky go! Special
Week approaches from the outside! But it's too late!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky has officially won the Kikuka Sho! And her time is... 3:03.2!
A new world record!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Derby Umamusume Special Week follows three lengths behind to
take second place!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
El Condor, it's El Condor! Air Groove and Special Week try to narrow
the gap, but it's too little, too late!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The classic-year Umamusume El Condor Pasa has taken on some of
the world's top racers and emerged the Japan Cup champion!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
As for her contemporary Special Week, her efforts on the final
straight land her in third place!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei and El sure were amazing...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The Golden Generation sure is something else. Even the Derby
Umamusume is struggling to win.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: What's more, you'll be going up against the senior racers this year.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
We can't let your seniors—or your juniors for that matter—get the
better of you! We've got to work hard!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even with her losing streak, Special Week continues to press onward,
ever smiling. Her sparkling dreams continue to illuminate her path,
unchanged by the passing of the new year.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong, Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong, Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah... No, it's nothing...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's great Spe's reached her senior year and all, but have you already
set her next goal?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, actually, I wanted to ask the same thing! What's the plan, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, I want to make use of those impressive skills of yours. Especially
that stamina you use late in the race.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
So I'm thinking the spring Tenno Sho would be the perfect place for
you to shine.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
So I'm thinking the spring Tenno Sho would be the perfect place for
you to shine.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Great idea! I wanna see Spe run in the spring Tenno Sho too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Some of our team members have even won that race! I bet they can
teach you all sorts of tips and tricks!

text_block_list.name: Sincere Umamusume
text_block_list.text: McQueen and Rice were both so cool when they won...

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh! Those races are what made me their fan for life!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: E-ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: If there's anything I can do to help, I will. Spe, let's win this race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! I promise I'll be the best student ever!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
All right, why don't we go around to the stalls now? Buy whatever you
want, my treat.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Let's start this year off on a good note!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Look out, Tenno Sho! With that win, I'll be one step closer to
being the best in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With those words, Special Week thrusts her determined fist into the
air.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes seem fixed on both a clear objective and a far-off dream at
the same time.
